facts: 100 assets × 12 monthly live rounds (Q1 2022 – Q1 2023) spanning Fed-tightening + inflation regime.
hypotheses: The 2022 regime exposed method-quality differentials rather than returns being so noise-dominated that ranking is random.
The forward-live design is genuinely OOD rather than a noisy in-distribution test for short-horizon near-martingale returns.
intuitions: The Makridakis et al. 2024 M6 results paper likely exists.
M5-vs-M6 transferability analyses and a post-2023 finance foundation model likely exist.
unknowns: There is no established primitive for 'evaluation under near-irreducible noise'.
